panels.title: Battery Health
panels.description: Current estimated battery health as a percentage of the reference capacity. Reference is the maximum capacity ever estimated from all historical charge sessions, unless overridden by the Nominal Capacity variable.
Current estimated capacity as a percentage of the reference capacity (average of the earliest 10 deep charge sessions in the selected period).

targets.rawSql:
WITH rated_efficiency AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(derived_efficiency, car_efficiency) AS efficiency
  FROM (
    SELECT
      ROUND((charge_energy_added / NULLIF(end_rated_range_km - start_rated_range_km, 0))::numeric, 3) * 100 AS derived_efficiency,
      COUNT(*) AS count,
      cars.id AS car_id,
      cars.efficiency * 100 AS car_efficiency
    FROM cars
    LEFT JOIN charging_processes ON
      cars.id = charging_processes.car_id
      AND duration_min > 10
      AND end_battery_level <= 95
      AND start_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL
      AND end_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL
      AND charge_energy_added > 0
    WHERE cars.id = $car_id
    GROUP BY 1, 3, 4
    ORDER BY 2 DESC
    LIMIT 1
  ) AS Efficiency
),
max_capacity AS (
  SELECT MAX(c.rated_battery_range_km * re.efficiency / c.usable_battery_level) AS cap
  FROM charging_processes cp
  INNER JOIN (
    SELECT charging_process_id, MAX(date) AS date
    FROM charges
    WHERE usable_battery_level > 0
    GROUP BY charging_process_id
  ) AS last_charge ON cp.id = last_charge.charging_process_id
  INNER JOIN charges c
    ON c.charging_process_id = cp.id AND c.date = last_charge.date
  CROSS JOIN rated_efficiency re
  WHERE cp.car_id = $car_id
    AND cp.end_date IS NOT NULL
    AND cp.charge_energy_added >= re.efficiency
    AND c.usable_battery_level > 0
),
current_capacity AS (
  SELECT AVG(capacity) AS cap
  FROM (
    SELECT c.rated_battery_range_km * re.efficiency / c.usable_battery_level AS capacity
    FROM charging_processes cp
    INNER JOIN charges c ON c.charging_process_id = cp.id
    CROSS JOIN rated_efficiency re
    WHERE cp.car_id = $car_id
      AND cp.end_date IS NOT NULL
      AND cp.charge_energy_added >= re.efficiency
      AND c.usable_battery_level > 0
    ORDER BY cp.end_date DESC, c.date DESC
    LIMIT 50
  ) AS recent
)
SELECT
  cp.end_date AS time,
  ROUND(((c.rated_battery_range_km * re.efficiency / c.usable_battery_level) * 100.0 / COALESCE(NULLIF($nominal_capacity, 0), max_capacity.cap))::numeric, 2) AS "Health %"
FROM charging_processes cp
INNER JOIN charges c ON c.charging_process_id = cp.id
CROSS JOIN max_capacity
CROSS JOIN rated_efficiency re
WHERE cp.car_id = $car_id
  AND cp.end_date IS NOT NULL
  AND cp.charge_energy_added >= re.efficiency
  AND c.usable_battery_level > 0
ORDER BY cp.end_date

panels.title: Battery Health

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  start_date AS time,
  ROUND((charge_energy_added / NULLIF((end_battery_level - start_battery_level)::numeric / 100.0, 0))::numeric, 1) AS "Capacity [kWh]",
  CASE
    WHEN EXTRACT(MONTH FROM start_date) IN (12,1,2) THEN 'Winter'
    WHEN EXTRACT(MONTH FROM start_date) IN (3,4,5) THEN 'Spring'
    WHEN EXTRACT(MONTH FROM start_date) IN (6,7,8) THEN 'Summer'
    ELSE 'Fall'
  END AS season
FROM charging_processes
WHERE car_id = $car_id
  AND charge_energy_added > 0
  AND end_battery_level > start_battery_level
  AND (end_battery_level - start_battery_level) > 10
  AND duration_min > 10
  AND $__timeFilter(start_date)
ORDER BY start_date

WITH monthly AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('month', start_date) AS month,
    AVG((charge_energy_added / NULLIF((end_battery_level - start_battery_level)::numeric / 100.0, 0))) AS avg_cap
  FROM charging_processes
  WHERE car_id = $car_id
    AND charge_energy_added > 0
    AND end_battery_level > start_battery_level
    AND (end_battery_level - start_battery_level) > 10
    AND duration_min > 10
    AND $__timeFilter(start_date)
  GROUP BY 1
  HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2
),
regression AS (
  SELECT
    regr_slope(avg_cap, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM month) / 86400.0) AS slope,
    regr_intercept(avg_cap, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM month) / 86400.0) AS intercept
  FROM monthly
)
SELECT
  month AS time,
  ROUND((regression.slope * (EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM month) / 86400.0) + regression.intercept)::numeric, 2) AS "Trend [kWh]"
FROM monthly, regression
ORDER BY month

WITH daily AS (SELECT date_trunc('day', cp.end_date) AS day, AVG(c.rated_battery_range_km * re.efficiency / c.usable_battery_level) AS avg_cap, STDDEV(c.rated_battery_range_km * re.efficiency / c.usable_battery_level) AS std_cap FROM charging_processes cp INNER JOIN charges c ON c.charging_process_id = cp.id, LATERAL (SELECT COALESCE(derived_efficiency, car_efficiency) AS efficiency FROM (SELECT ROUND((charge_energy_added / NULLIF(end_rated_range_km - start_rated_range_km, 0))::numeric, 3) * 100 AS derived_efficiency, COUNT(*) AS count, cars.id AS car_id, cars.efficiency * 100 AS car_efficiency FROM cars LEFT JOIN charging_processes ON cars.id = charging_processes.car_id AND duration_min > 10 AND end_battery_level <= 95 AND start_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL AND end_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL AND charge_energy_added > 0 WHERE cars.id = $car_id GROUP BY 1, 3, 4 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 1) AS Efficiency) re WHERE cp.car_id = $car_id AND cp.end_date IS NOT NULL AND c.usable_battery_level > 0 GROUP BY 1) SELECT day AS time, avg_cap + std_cap AS "Upper Bound", avg_cap - std_cap AS "Lower Bound" FROM daily ORDER BY day

panels.title: Capacity Over Time
panels.description: Per-session estimated capacity colored by season, with a linear regression trend line showing the degradation slope.
Reference capacity used for health and loss calculations. Defaults to the maximum capacity ever estimated from all historical charge sessions. Override with the Nominal Capacity variable.

targets.rawSql:
WITH rated_efficiency AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(derived_efficiency, car_efficiency) AS efficiency
  FROM (
    SELECT
      ROUND((charge_energy_added / NULLIF(end_rated_range_km - start_rated_range_km, 0))::numeric, 3) * 100 AS derived_efficiency,
      COUNT(*) AS count,
      cars.id AS car_id,
      cars.efficiency * 100 AS car_efficiency
    FROM cars
    LEFT JOIN charging_processes ON
      cars.id = charging_processes.car_id
      AND duration_min > 10
      AND end_battery_level <= 95
      AND start_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL
      AND end_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL
      AND charge_energy_added > 0
    WHERE cars.id = $car_id
    GROUP BY 1, 3, 4
    ORDER BY 2 DESC
    LIMIT 1
  ) AS Efficiency
),
max_capacity AS (
  SELECT MAX(c.rated_battery_range_km * re.efficiency / c.usable_battery_level) AS cap
  FROM charging_processes cp
  INNER JOIN (
    SELECT charging_process_id, MAX(date) AS date
    FROM charges
    WHERE usable_battery_level > 0
    GROUP BY charging_process_id
  ) AS last_charge ON cp.id = last_charge.charging_process_id
  INNER JOIN charges c
    ON c.charging_process_id = cp.id AND c.date = last_charge.date
  CROSS JOIN rated_efficiency re
  WHERE cp.car_id = $car_id
    AND cp.end_date IS NOT NULL
    AND cp.charge_energy_added >= re.efficiency
    AND c.usable_battery_level > 0
),
current_capacity AS (
  SELECT AVG(capacity) AS cap
  FROM (
    SELECT c.rated_battery_range_km * re.efficiency / c.usable_battery_level AS capacity
    FROM charging_processes cp
    INNER JOIN charges c ON c.charging_process_id = cp.id
    CROSS JOIN rated_efficiency re
    WHERE cp.car_id = $car_id
      AND cp.end_date IS NOT NULL
      AND cp.charge_energy_added >= re.efficiency
      AND c.usable_battery_level > 0
    ORDER BY cp.end_date DESC, c.date DESC
    LIMIT 50
  ) AS recent
)
SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(NULLIF($nominal_capacity, 0), max_capacity.cap)::numeric, 2) AS "Reference [kWh]"
FROM max_capacity, current_capacity

panels.title: Reference Capacity

panels.description: Average estimated capacity from the 50 most recent qualifying charge sessions.

targets.rawSql:
WITH rated_efficiency AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(derived_efficiency, car_efficiency) AS efficiency
  FROM (
    SELECT
      ROUND((charge_energy_added / NULLIF(end_rated_range_km - start_rated_range_km, 0))::numeric, 3) * 100 AS derived_efficiency,
      COUNT(*) AS count,
      cars.id AS car_id,
      cars.efficiency * 100 AS car_efficiency
    FROM cars
    LEFT JOIN charging_processes ON
      cars.id = charging_processes.car_id
      AND duration_min > 10
      AND end_battery_level <= 95
      AND start_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL
      AND end_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL
      AND charge_energy_added > 0
    WHERE cars.id = $car_id
    GROUP BY 1, 3, 4
    ORDER BY 2 DESC
    LIMIT 1
  ) AS Efficiency
),
max_capacity AS (
  SELECT MAX(c.rated_battery_range_km * re.efficiency / c.usable_battery_level) AS cap
  FROM charging_processes cp
  INNER JOIN (
    SELECT charging_process_id, MAX(date) AS date
    FROM charges
    WHERE usable_battery_level > 0
    GROUP BY charging_process_id
  ) AS last_charge ON cp.id = last_charge.charging_process_id
  INNER JOIN charges c
    ON c.charging_process_id = cp.id AND c.date = last_charge.date
  CROSS JOIN rated_efficiency re
  WHERE cp.car_id = $car_id
    AND cp.end_date IS NOT NULL
    AND cp.charge_energy_added >= re.efficiency
    AND c.usable_battery_level > 0
),
current_capacity AS (
  SELECT AVG(capacity) AS cap
  FROM (
    SELECT c.rated_battery_range_km * re.efficiency / c.usable_battery_level AS capacity
    FROM charging_processes cp
    INNER JOIN charges c ON c.charging_process_id = cp.id
    CROSS JOIN rated_efficiency re
    WHERE cp.car_id = $car_id
      AND cp.end_date IS NOT NULL
      AND cp.charge_energy_added >= re.efficiency
      AND c.usable_battery_level > 0
    ORDER BY cp.end_date DESC, c.date DESC
    LIMIT 50
  ) AS recent
)
SELECT ROUND(current_capacity.cap::numeric, 2) AS "Current [kWh]"
FROM max_capacity, current_capacity

panels.title: Current Capacity

panels.description: Difference between reference capacity and current capacity.

targets.rawSql:
WITH rated_efficiency AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(derived_efficiency, car_efficiency) AS efficiency
  FROM (
    SELECT
      ROUND((charge_energy_added / NULLIF(end_rated_range_km - start_rated_range_km, 0))::numeric, 3) * 100 AS derived_efficiency,
      COUNT(*) AS count,
      cars.id AS car_id,
      cars.efficiency * 100 AS car_efficiency
    FROM cars
    LEFT JOIN charging_processes ON
      cars.id = charging_processes.car_id
      AND duration_min > 10
      AND end_battery_level <= 95
      AND start_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL
      AND end_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL
      AND charge_energy_added > 0
    WHERE cars.id = $car_id
    GROUP BY 1, 3, 4
    ORDER BY 2 DESC
    LIMIT 1
  ) AS Efficiency
),
max_capacity AS (
  SELECT MAX(c.rated_battery_range_km * re.efficiency / c.usable_battery_level) AS cap
  FROM charging_processes cp
  INNER JOIN (
    SELECT charging_process_id, MAX(date) AS date
    FROM charges
    WHERE usable_battery_level > 0
    GROUP BY charging_process_id
  ) AS last_charge ON cp.id = last_charge.charging_process_id
  INNER JOIN charges c
    ON c.charging_process_id = cp.id AND c.date = last_charge.date
  CROSS JOIN rated_efficiency re
  WHERE cp.car_id = $car_id
    AND cp.end_date IS NOT NULL
    AND cp.charge_energy_added >= re.efficiency
    AND c.usable_battery_level > 0
),
current_capacity AS (
  SELECT AVG(capacity) AS cap
  FROM (
    SELECT c.rated_battery_range_km * re.efficiency / c.usable_battery_level AS capacity
    FROM charging_processes cp
    INNER JOIN charges c ON c.charging_process_id = cp.id
    CROSS JOIN rated_efficiency re
    WHERE cp.car_id = $car_id
      AND cp.end_date IS NOT NULL
      AND cp.charge_energy_added >= re.efficiency
      AND c.usable_battery_level > 0
    ORDER BY cp.end_date DESC, c.date DESC
    LIMIT 50
  ) AS recent
)
SELECT ROUND((COALESCE(NULLIF($nominal_capacity, 0), max_capacity.cap) - current_capacity.cap)::numeric, 2) AS "Lost [kWh]"
FROM max_capacity, current_capacity

panels.title: Capacity Lost

panels.description: Estimated capacity loss per year based on linear regression of all qualifying sessions.

targets.rawSql:
WITH sessions AS (
  SELECT
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM start_date) / 86400.0 AS day_num,
    (charge_energy_added / NULLIF((end_battery_level - start_battery_level)::numeric / 100.0, 0)) AS est_cap
  FROM charging_processes
  WHERE car_id = $car_id
    AND charge_energy_added > 0
    AND end_battery_level > start_battery_level
    AND (end_battery_level - start_battery_level) > 10
    AND duration_min > 10
    AND $__timeFilter(start_date)
)
SELECT
  ROUND((regr_slope(est_cap, day_num) * 365.0)::numeric, 2) AS "Degradation [kWh/yr]"
FROM sessions
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5

panels.title: Degradation Rate

panels.description: Estimated capacity after one year at the current degradation rate.

targets.rawSql:
WITH rated_efficiency AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(derived_efficiency, car_efficiency) AS efficiency
  FROM (
    SELECT
      ROUND((charge_energy_added / NULLIF(end_rated_range_km - start_rated_range_km, 0))::numeric, 3) * 100 AS derived_efficiency,
      COUNT(*) AS count,
      cars.id AS car_id,
      cars.efficiency * 100 AS car_efficiency
    FROM cars
    LEFT JOIN charging_processes ON
      cars.id = charging_processes.car_id
      AND duration_min > 10
      AND end_battery_level <= 95
      AND start_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL
      AND end_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL
      AND charge_energy_added > 0
    WHERE cars.id = $car_id
    GROUP BY 1, 3, 4
    ORDER BY 2 DESC
    LIMIT 1
  ) AS Efficiency
),
max_capacity AS (
  SELECT MAX(c.rated_battery_range_km * re.efficiency / c.usable_battery_level) AS cap
  FROM charging_processes cp
  INNER JOIN (
    SELECT charging_process_id, MAX(date) AS date
    FROM charges
    WHERE usable_battery_level > 0
    GROUP BY charging_process_id
  ) AS last_charge ON cp.id = last_charge.charging_process_id
  INNER JOIN charges c
    ON c.charging_process_id = cp.id AND c.date = last_charge.date
  CROSS JOIN rated_efficiency re
  WHERE cp.car_id = $car_id
    AND cp.end_date IS NOT NULL
    AND cp.charge_energy_added >= re.efficiency
    AND c.usable_battery_level > 0
),
current_capacity AS (
  SELECT AVG(capacity) AS cap
  FROM (
    SELECT c.rated_battery_range_km * re.efficiency / c.usable_battery_level AS capacity
    FROM charging_processes cp
    INNER JOIN charges c ON c.charging_process_id = cp.id
    CROSS JOIN rated_efficiency re
    WHERE cp.car_id = $car_id
      AND cp.end_date IS NOT NULL
      AND cp.charge_energy_added >= re.efficiency
      AND c.usable_battery_level > 0
    ORDER BY cp.end_date DESC, c.date DESC
    LIMIT 50
  ) AS recent
),
regression AS (
  SELECT regr_slope(capacity, day_num) * 365.0 AS slope
  FROM (
    SELECT
      EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM cp.end_date) / 86400.0 AS day_num,
      c.rated_battery_range_km * re.efficiency / c.usable_battery_level AS capacity
    FROM charging_processes cp
    INNER JOIN charges c ON c.charging_process_id = cp.id
    CROSS JOIN rated_efficiency re
    WHERE cp.car_id = $car_id
      AND cp.end_date IS NOT NULL
      AND cp.charge_energy_added >= re.efficiency
      AND c.usable_battery_level > 0
  ) s
  HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5
)
SELECT ROUND((current_capacity.cap + COALESCE(regression.slope, 0))::numeric, 2) AS "Projected [kWh]"
FROM max_capacity, current_capacity, regression

panels.title: Projected (1 Year)

panels.description: Number of charge sessions that meet the minimum criteria for capacity estimation.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Sessions Analyzed"
FROM charging_processes
WHERE car_id = $car_id
  AND charge_energy_added > 0
  AND end_battery_level > start_battery_level
  AND (end_battery_level - start_battery_level) > 10
  AND duration_min > 10
  AND $__timeFilter(start_date)

panels.title: Sessions Analyzed

panels.description: Difference between the highest and lowest seasonal average capacity estimates.

targets.rawSql:
WITH seasonal AS (
  SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN EXTRACT(MONTH FROM start_date) IN (12,1,2) THEN 'Winter'
      WHEN EXTRACT(MONTH FROM start_date) IN (3,4,5) THEN 'Spring'
      WHEN EXTRACT(MONTH FROM start_date) IN (6,7,8) THEN 'Summer'
      ELSE 'Fall'
    END AS season,
    ROUND(AVG((charge_energy_added / NULLIF((end_battery_level - start_battery_level)::numeric / 100.0, 0)))::numeric, 1) AS avg_cap
  FROM charging_processes
  WHERE car_id = $car_id
    AND charge_energy_added > 0
    AND end_battery_level > start_battery_level
    AND (end_battery_level - start_battery_level) > 10
    AND duration_min > 10
    AND $__timeFilter(start_date)
  GROUP BY 1
  HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2
)
SELECT ROUND((MAX(avg_cap) - MIN(avg_cap))::numeric, 2) AS "Seasonal Range [kWh]"
FROM seasonal

panels.title: Seasonal Range

panels.description: Estimated full range at 100% SOC based on current capacity and the cars efficiency factor.

targets.rawSql:
WITH deep_sessions AS (
  SELECT
    start_date,
    charge_energy_added,
    end_battery_level,
    start_battery_level,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY start_date ASC) AS rn_asc,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY start_date DESC) AS rn_desc
  FROM charging_processes
  WHERE car_id = $car_id
    AND charge_energy_added > 0
    AND end_battery_level > start_battery_level
    AND (end_battery_level - start_battery_level) > 30
    AND duration_min > 30
    AND $__timeFilter(start_date)
),
reference AS (
  SELECT AVG(charge_energy_added / NULLIF((end_battery_level - start_battery_level)::numeric / 100.0, 0)) AS cap
  FROM deep_sessions WHERE rn_asc <= 10
),
current AS (
  SELECT AVG(charge_energy_added / NULLIF((end_battery_level - start_battery_level)::numeric / 100.0, 0)) AS cap
  FROM deep_sessions WHERE rn_desc <= 10
)
SELECT ROUND((current.cap / NULLIF(cars.efficiency, 0))::numeric, 1) AS "Range @100% [km]"
FROM current, cars
WHERE cars.id = $car_id

panels.title: Est. Full Range @100%

panels.description: Total energy charged divided by current estimated capacity. One cycle equals one full charge equivalent.

targets.rawSql:
WITH current AS (
  SELECT AVG(charge_energy_added / NULLIF((end_battery_level - start_battery_level)::numeric / 100.0, 0)) AS cap
  FROM charging_processes
  WHERE car_id = $car_id
    AND charge_energy_added > 0
    AND end_battery_level > start_battery_level
    AND (end_battery_level - start_battery_level) > 30
    AND duration_min > 30
    AND $__timeFilter(start_date)
)
SELECT ROUND((SUM(cp.charge_energy_added) / NULLIF(MAX(current.cap), 0))::numeric, 1) AS "Charge Cycles"
FROM charging_processes cp, current
WHERE cp.car_id = $car_id
  AND cp.charge_energy_added > 0
  AND $__timeFilter(cp.start_date)

panels.title: Est. Charge Cycles

panels.description: Capacity loss per 10,000 km driven during the selected period.

targets.rawSql:
WITH deep_sessions AS (
  SELECT
    start_date,
    charge_energy_added,
    end_battery_level,
    start_battery_level,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY start_date ASC) AS rn_asc,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY start_date DESC) AS rn_desc
  FROM charging_processes
  WHERE car_id = $car_id
    AND charge_energy_added > 0
    AND end_battery_level > start_battery_level
    AND (end_battery_level - start_battery_level) > 30
    AND duration_min > 30
    AND $__timeFilter(start_date)
),
reference AS (
  SELECT AVG(charge_energy_added / NULLIF((end_battery_level - start_battery_level)::numeric / 100.0, 0)) AS cap
  FROM deep_sessions WHERE rn_asc <= 10
),
current AS (
  SELECT AVG(charge_energy_added / NULLIF((end_battery_level - start_battery_level)::numeric / 100.0, 0)) AS cap
  FROM deep_sessions WHERE rn_desc <= 10
),
totals AS (
  SELECT MAX(end_km) - MIN(start_km) AS total_km
  FROM drives
  WHERE car_id = $car_id AND $__timeFilter(start_date)
)
SELECT ROUND(((reference.cap - current.cap) / NULLIF(totals.total_km, 0) * 10000.0)::numeric, 3) AS "Loss / 10k km [kWh]"
FROM reference, current, totals

panels.title: Degradation / 10,000 km

panels.description: Days since the last deep charge session used for capacity estimation.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ROUND((EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - MAX(start_date))) / 86400.0)::numeric, 1) AS "Days Since Deep"
FROM charging_processes
WHERE car_id = $car_id
  AND charge_energy_added > 0
  AND end_battery_level > start_battery_level
  AND (end_battery_level - start_battery_level) > 30
  AND duration_min > 30

panels.title: Days Since Deep Session

panels.description: Average battery capacity per calendar month with number of sessions. Blue bars = avg capacity, green line = session count.

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('month', cp.end_date) AS time, ROUND(AVG(c.rated_battery_range_km * re.efficiency / c.usable_battery_level)::numeric, 1) AS "Avg Monthly [kWh]" FROM charging_processes cp INNER JOIN charges c ON c.charging_process_id = cp.id, LATERAL (SELECT COALESCE(derived_efficiency, car_efficiency) AS efficiency FROM (SELECT ROUND((charge_energy_added / NULLIF(end_rated_range_km - start_rated_range_km, 0))::numeric, 3) * 100 AS derived_efficiency, COUNT(*) AS count, cars.id AS car_id, cars.efficiency * 100 AS car_efficiency FROM cars LEFT JOIN charging_processes ON cars.id = charging_processes.car_id AND duration_min > 10 AND end_battery_level <= 95 AND start_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL AND end_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL AND charge_energy_added > 0 WHERE cars.id = $car_id GROUP BY 1, 3, 4 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 1) AS Efficiency) re WHERE cp.car_id = $car_id AND cp.end_date IS NOT NULL AND c.usable_battery_level > 0 GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT date_trunc('month', cp.end_date) AS time, COUNT(*)::int AS "Sessions" FROM charging_processes cp INNER JOIN charges c ON c.charging_process_id = cp.id WHERE cp.car_id = $car_id AND cp.end_date IS NOT NULL AND c.usable_battery_level > 0 GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Monthly Capacity Overview

panels.description: Capacity estimates (dots) with outside temperature (line, right axis). Helps visualize how temperature affects battery capacity — heat-related degradation or cold-related reduction.

targets.rawSql: SELECT cp.start_date AS time, ROUND((c.rated_battery_range_km * re.efficiency / c.usable_battery_level)::numeric, 1) AS "Capacity [kWh]" FROM charging_processes cp INNER JOIN charges c ON c.charging_process_id = cp.id, LATERAL (SELECT COALESCE(derived_efficiency, car_efficiency) AS efficiency FROM (SELECT ROUND((charge_energy_added / NULLIF(end_rated_range_km - start_rated_range_km, 0))::numeric, 3) * 100 AS derived_efficiency, COUNT(*) AS count, cars.id AS car_id, cars.efficiency * 100 AS car_efficiency FROM cars LEFT JOIN charging_processes ON cars.id = charging_processes.car_id AND duration_min > 10 AND end_battery_level <= 95 AND start_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL AND end_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL AND charge_energy_added > 0 WHERE cars.id = $car_id GROUP BY 1, 3, 4 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 1) AS Efficiency) re WHERE cp.car_id = $car_id AND cp.end_date IS NOT NULL AND c.usable_battery_level > 0 AND cp.outside_temp_avg IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(cp.start_date) ORDER BY time

SELECT cp.start_date AS time, ROUND(AVG(c.rated_battery_range_km * re.efficiency / c.usable_battery_level) OVER (ORDER BY cp.start_date ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW)::numeric, 1) AS "30-Day Avg [kWh]" FROM charging_processes cp INNER JOIN charges c ON c.charging_process_id = cp.id, LATERAL (SELECT COALESCE(derived_efficiency, car_efficiency) AS efficiency FROM (SELECT ROUND((charge_energy_added / NULLIF(end_rated_range_km - start_rated_range_km, 0))::numeric, 3) * 100 AS derived_efficiency, COUNT(*) AS count, cars.id AS car_id, cars.efficiency * 100 AS car_efficiency FROM cars LEFT JOIN charging_processes ON cars.id = charging_processes.car_id AND duration_min > 10 AND end_battery_level <= 95 AND start_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL AND end_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL AND charge_energy_added > 0 WHERE cars.id = $car_id GROUP BY 1, 3, 4 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 1) AS Efficiency) re WHERE cp.car_id = $car_id AND cp.end_date IS NOT NULL AND c.usable_battery_level > 0 AND cp.outside_temp_avg IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(cp.start_date) ORDER BY time

SELECT start_date AS time, outside_temp_avg AS "Outside Temp [°C]" FROM charging_processes WHERE car_id = $car_id AND charge_energy_added > 0 AND end_battery_level > start_battery_level AND outside_temp_avg IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(start_date) ORDER BY start_date

panels.title: Capacity vs Outside Temperature

panels.description: Capacity estimates color-coded by charger type: AC (green, home/Level 2) vs DC Fast (orange, Supercharger). Dashed lines show 30-day rolling averages.

targets.rawSql: WITH efficiency AS (SELECT COALESCE(derived_efficiency, car_efficiency) AS efficiency FROM (SELECT ROUND((charge_energy_added / NULLIF(end_rated_range_km - start_rated_range_km, 0))::numeric, 3) * 100 AS derived_efficiency, COUNT(*) AS count, cars.id AS car_id, cars.efficiency * 100 AS car_efficiency FROM cars LEFT JOIN charging_processes ON cars.id = charging_processes.car_id AND duration_min > 10 AND end_battery_level <= 95 AND start_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL AND end_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL AND charge_energy_added > 0 WHERE cars.id = $car_id GROUP BY 1, 3, 4 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 1) AS sub) SELECT cp.start_date AS time, ROUND((c.rated_battery_range_km * (SELECT efficiency FROM efficiency) / c.usable_battery_level)::numeric, 1) AS "AC" FROM charging_processes cp INNER JOIN charges c ON c.charging_process_id = cp.id WHERE cp.car_id = $car_id AND cp.end_date IS NOT NULL AND c.usable_battery_level > 0 AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM charges c2 WHERE c2.charging_process_id = cp.id AND c2.fast_charger_present = true LIMIT 1) AND $__timeFilter(cp.start_date) ORDER BY time

WITH efficiency AS (SELECT COALESCE(derived_efficiency, car_efficiency) AS efficiency FROM (SELECT ROUND((charge_energy_added / NULLIF(end_rated_range_km - start_rated_range_km, 0))::numeric, 3) * 100 AS derived_efficiency, COUNT(*) AS count, cars.id AS car_id, cars.efficiency * 100 AS car_efficiency FROM cars LEFT JOIN charging_processes ON cars.id = charging_processes.car_id AND duration_min > 10 AND end_battery_level <= 95 AND start_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL AND end_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL AND charge_energy_added > 0 WHERE cars.id = $car_id GROUP BY 1, 3, 4 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 1) AS sub) SELECT cp.start_date AS time, ROUND((c.rated_battery_range_km * (SELECT efficiency FROM efficiency) / c.usable_battery_level)::numeric, 1) AS "DC Fast" FROM charging_processes cp INNER JOIN charges c ON c.charging_process_id = cp.id WHERE cp.car_id = $car_id AND cp.end_date IS NOT NULL AND c.usable_battery_level > 0 AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM charges c2 WHERE c2.charging_process_id = cp.id AND c2.fast_charger_present = true LIMIT 1) AND $__timeFilter(cp.start_date) ORDER BY time

WITH efficiency AS (SELECT COALESCE(derived_efficiency, car_efficiency) AS efficiency FROM (SELECT ROUND((charge_energy_added / NULLIF(end_rated_range_km - start_rated_range_km, 0))::numeric, 3) * 100 AS derived_efficiency, COUNT(*) AS count, cars.id AS car_id, cars.efficiency * 100 AS car_efficiency FROM cars LEFT JOIN charging_processes ON cars.id = charging_processes.car_id AND duration_min > 10 AND end_battery_level <= 95 AND start_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL AND end_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL AND charge_energy_added > 0 WHERE cars.id = $car_id GROUP BY 1, 3, 4 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 1) AS sub) SELECT cp.start_date AS time, ROUND(AVG(c.rated_battery_range_km * (SELECT efficiency FROM efficiency) / c.usable_battery_level) OVER (ORDER BY cp.start_date ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW)::numeric, 1) AS "AC Avg (30d)" FROM charging_processes cp INNER JOIN charges c ON c.charging_process_id = cp.id WHERE cp.car_id = $car_id AND cp.end_date IS NOT NULL AND c.usable_battery_level > 0 AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM charges c2 WHERE c2.charging_process_id = cp.id AND c2.fast_charger_present = true LIMIT 1) AND $__timeFilter(cp.start_date) ORDER BY time

WITH efficiency AS (SELECT COALESCE(derived_efficiency, car_efficiency) AS efficiency FROM (SELECT ROUND((charge_energy_added / NULLIF(end_rated_range_km - start_rated_range_km, 0))::numeric, 3) * 100 AS derived_efficiency, COUNT(*) AS count, cars.id AS car_id, cars.efficiency * 100 AS car_efficiency FROM cars LEFT JOIN charging_processes ON cars.id = charging_processes.car_id AND duration_min > 10 AND end_battery_level <= 95 AND start_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL AND end_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL AND charge_energy_added > 0 WHERE cars.id = $car_id GROUP BY 1, 3, 4 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 1) AS sub) SELECT cp.start_date AS time, ROUND(AVG(c.rated_battery_range_km * (SELECT efficiency FROM efficiency) / c.usable_battery_level) OVER (ORDER BY cp.start_date ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW)::numeric, 1) AS "DC Avg (30d)" FROM charging_processes cp INNER JOIN charges c ON c.charging_process_id = cp.id WHERE cp.car_id = $car_id AND cp.end_date IS NOT NULL AND c.usable_battery_level > 0 AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM charges c2 WHERE c2.charging_process_id = cp.id AND c2.fast_charger_present = true LIMIT 1) AND $__timeFilter(cp.start_date) ORDER BY time

panels.title: Capacity: DC Fast vs AC

list.definition:
SELECT
    id as __value,
    CASE WHEN COUNT(id) OVER (PARTITION BY name) > 1 AND name IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(name, ' - ', RIGHT(vin, 6)) ELSE COALESCE(name, CONCAT('VIN ', vin)) end as __text
FROM cars
ORDER BY display_priority ASC, name ASC, vin ASC
list.label: Car
list.name: car_id
list.query:
SELECT
    id as __value,
    CASE WHEN COUNT(id) OVER (PARTITION BY name) > 1 AND name IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(name, ' - ', RIGHT(vin, 6)) ELSE COALESCE(name, CONCAT('VIN ', vin)) end as __text
FROM cars
ORDER BY display_priority ASC, name ASC, vin ASC

list.definition: SELECT efficiency FROM cars WHERE id = $car_id
list.name: efficiency
list.query: SELECT efficiency FROM cars WHERE id = $car_id

title: Battery Capacity & Degradation
description: TeslaMate battery capacity estimation, degradation tracking, and capacity breakdowns. Part of Teslamate Ecos custom dashboards — built on a Tesla named Ecos.
